subcodes.first_line: O sagacious man! This earthly realm is the centre of upheavals, and this foundationless world is the arena of tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الرجل الرشید این خاکدان مرکز انقلابست و این جهان بی بنیان میدان محن و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
